description_long: This is a large, ornate axe featuring a robust metallic double-bladed head with angular, industrial-inspired design elements. The blades are steel-gray with sharp, beveled edges and reinforced with visible bolts and rivets, giving a mechanical appearance. The handle is constructed from a wood-like material with metallic bands and fittings, including a spiked pommel and a secondary grip area wrapped in black material for improved handling. Blue metallic tubes or wires run along the handle, adding a technological or steampunk aesthetic. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for both display and functional use. Decorative gears and mechanical motifs are integrated into the head and handle, enhancing its visual complexity.
description: A large, industrial-style double-bladed axe with metallic and wood elements, featuring mechanical details and blue tubing.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the double-bladed head, visible bolts, and blue tubing along the handle.
description_view_1: The narrow edge-on view shows the thin profile of the blades and the layered construction of the head.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the mechanical gears and the spiked pommel at the handle's base.
description_view_3: The rear edge-on view reveals the symmetry of the blades and the alignment of the handle's fittings.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, wood-like with metallic bands, black grip wrap, and a spiked pommel; ergonomic and reinforced.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed head with angular, beveled edges, mechanical gears, bolts, and a partial beard; industrial and decorative.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern mechanical mounting with visible bolts, gears, and reinforced fittings.
